headline: Susquehanna Raises Price Target on Halliburton (HAL)
summary: Halliburton Co. (NYSE:HAL) is one of the 10 best oil and gas equipment & services stocks to buy according to hedge funds. On April 7, Charles Minervino from Susquehanna increased the price target on Halliburton Company (NYSE:HAL) from $40 to $45 while maintaining a Positive rating on the stock.
